Headline: #112 Vincennes/111th Temporary Reroute at 111th/Sacramento
ShortDescription: #112 Vincennes/111th buses are temp. rerouted in both directions via 111th, Kedzie, 115th, Western and 111th,  over normal route at 111th/Sacramento.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#112 Vincennes/111th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 111th, Kedzie, 115th, Western and 111th, then resume their normal route on 111th.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage at 111th/Sacramento.

Allow extra travel time.
